name: West African Groundnut Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam or boil sweet potato cubes until tender.
2. In a pan, sauté garlic, ginger, and spices for 1 minute.
3. Add onions and cook until soft.
4. Stir in tomatoes, eggplant, and stock (or water).
5. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add zucchini and bell peppers; continue simmering until all vegetables are tender (~20 minutes).
7. Return sweet potatoes to the stew.
8. Mix in tomato juice and peanut butter.
9. Cook on very low heat for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
10. Serve over rice, couscous, or millet.
